expectations.text: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
expectations.evidence: importmap with three@0.165.0 from unpkg.com found

expectations.text: Scene uses PlaneGeometry or similar for terrain mesh
expectations.evidence: THREE.PlaneGeometry used for terrain mesh (agent described and code confirmed)

expectations.text: Vertices are displaced to create terrain height variation
expectations.evidence: fbm() function with Perlin noise + 6 octaves found; vertices displaced by height values

expectations.text: Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
expectations.evidence: Three.js canvas area on left, .panel aside on right found in HTML

expectations.text: Right panel has a roughness control
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='roughness' min=0.1 max=1.0 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a height scale control
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='heightScale' min=0.5 max=10.0 present

expectations.text: Right panel has a color scheme selector with at least desert/arctic/forest
expectations.evidence: scheme-btn buttons for desert, arctic, forest found

expectations.text: Right panel has a Regenerate button
expectations.evidence: button id='regen' with '⟳ Regenerate Terrain' label present

expectations.text: Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
